todayLearnings.title: 2026-05-06 — Cron self-learning guardrail
todayLearnings.insight: Broad autonomous prompts can hit Hermes max tool-call RuntimeError. Bounded loops with strict tool-call budgets survive better.
todayLearnings.whyItMatters: Mike wants autonomous intelligence, but reliability matters more than long uncontrolled runs.
todayLearnings.nextAction: Continue appending learning entries here and later turn repeated patterns into dashboard widgets or scheduled reports.

opportunityRadar.title: AI Inquiry and Quote Copilot for Tour Operators
opportunityRadar.thesis: AI assistant that reads WhatsApp/LINE/email inquiries, asks missing questions, creates trip options, estimates price, drafts Thai/English replies, and schedules follow-up.
opportunityRadar.pricing: 12,000–35,000 THB setup + 3,000–12,000 THB/month support, depending on volume and integrations.
opportunityRadar.validationStep: Create 5 realistic inquiry examples from Wiro patterns; show before/after response drafts and quote generation; ask operators if they would pay for a pilot.

opportunityRadar.title: Wiro Internal Booking/Itinerary OS → Micro-SaaS
opportunityRadar.thesis: Lightweight operating system for bookings: inquiry capture, customer profile, itinerary builder, quote calculator, deposit/payment status, prep checklist, guide notes, follow-up reminders.
opportunityRadar.pricing: 2,500–9,000 THB/month SaaS or 25,000–75,000 THB setup + monthly maintenance.
opportunityRadar.validationStep: Build only the Wiro version first. Then show screens to 10 similar operators and ask which part they would pay for.

opportunityRadar.title: Review/Reputation Autopilot for Tours and Local Services
opportunityRadar.thesis: Automated review request system: post-service messages, Google/Tripadvisor review links, negative-feedback interception, testimonials, owner reply drafts, monthly reputation report.
opportunityRadar.validationStep: Mock one monthly report and 3 message flows. Offer a manual pilot using Google Sheets plus scheduled messages.

opportunityRadar.title: WhatsApp/LINE Follow-up and No-show Reducer
opportunityRadar.thesis: Simple reminder and follow-up automations for inquiries, deposits, trip prep, pickup time, review requests, and abandoned conversations.
opportunityRadar.validationStep: Ask businesses to count last month’s unanswered inquiries/no-shows; show ROI from recovering 1 booking.

opportunityRadar.title: AI Trip Planner Lead Magnet for Chiang Mai/North Thailand
opportunityRadar.thesis: Public-facing AI trip planner that recommends routes, seasons, durations, packing lists, and Wiro-relevant experiences; captures leads for Wiro or partner tours.
opportunityRadar.pricing: Internal lead value first; if white-labeled, 2,000–8,000 THB/month.
opportunityRadar.validationStep: Create landing page with itinerary quiz and manual AI-generated itinerary delivery. Track opt-ins and Wiro inquiries.

guardrails: Classify every recommendation before execution.
Never send customer-facing messages without Mike approval.
Never spend money, subscribe, or publish publicly without Mike approval.
Never delete/cleanup unknown files or force push.
Never expose secrets; show configured/missing only.
Commit/push/deploy only when Mike explicitly approves that scope.

phase5E.summary: Phase 5E active: Oracle now applies a quality/taste filter before proactive reports, keeps Wiro-first opportunity hypotheses, and improves approval UX before more autonomy.

scores.label: Fit to Mike/Wiro assets
scores.evidence: Prioritize Wiro4x4, Chiang Mai tourism, Thai/English, coding leverage, and Mike-owned assets.

scores.label: Revenue potential
scores.evidence: AI Inquiry and Quote Copilot for Tour Operators ranked 95/100 before quality filters.

scores.label: Effort to validate
scores.evidence: Manual Wiro-style examples can validate before building SaaS or outreach.

scores.label: Annoyance risk
scores.evidence: Mike rejected approval/framing around generic opportunity reports; future reports must avoid “approve idea” language.

rules.pattern: approve opportunity / approve idea / approve direction
rules.reason: Mike corrected that business ideas should not be framed as approvals; they are hypotheses to watch/test/ignore.

rules.pattern: generic AI SaaS without Wiro observed fact
rules.reason: Generic opportunity hunting feels low quality unless tied to a real Wiro inquiry, itinerary, pricing, guest, or ops pattern.

rules.pattern: more than one optional action in a proactive report
rules.reason: Reports should reduce decision load, not ask Mike to approve multiple speculative ideas.

tasteFilters.lastCorrection: Mike said the evening report approval framing was not good; Phase 5E rewrites opportunity recommendations as watch/test/ignore hypotheses.

candidates.title: Wiro inquiry response manual test
candidates.observedFact: Wiro4x4 receives custom-tour inquiries where fast, accurate English/Hebrew/Thai replies matter.
candidates.hypothesis: A human-approved AI draft can reduce reply time and improve quote consistency without becoming SaaS yet.
candidates.tinyTest: Create 5 realistic Wiro inquiry examples and compare current reply vs AI-assisted draft; do not contact anyone.

candidates.title: Wiro internal itinerary OS watch item
candidates.observedFact: Itinerary, pricing, prep checklist, and guide notes repeat across tours.
candidates.hypothesis: A single internal Wiro operating sheet/app may produce value before any micro-SaaS packaging.
candidates.tinyTest: Map one real Wiro booking from inquiry → itinerary → quote → prep checklist using a private template.

candidates.title: Generic AI SaaS idea without Wiro evidence
candidates.observedFact: Broad AI SaaS ideas are easy to generate but often feel generic.
candidates.hypothesis: Suppress until tied to a real Wiro/customer signal.
candidates.tinyTest: No action. Wait for a real inquiry, repeated task, or guest pain.

wiroFirstOpportunityFilter.rule: A proactive business suggestion must be tied to an observed Wiro/Mike asset or stay as keep-watching/ignore.

approvalUx.template:
What this does: <one sentence>
Risk: <low/medium/high + reason>
Rollback: <how to undo/stop>
Why now: <evidence or watch item>
Decision: approve once / draft only / not useful / ask later

options.label: Approve once
options.effect: Run only this scoped action once; no recurring automation.

options.label: Draft only
options.effect: Prepare private artifact only; do not send/publish/deploy.

options.label: Not useful
options.effect: Downrank similar future suggestions in the taste filter.

options.label: Ask me later
options.effect: Defer without treating it as approval or rejection.

phase5H.summary: Phase 5H active: missing Oracle ecosystem features are now dependency-ordered and visible before engineering work starts.

missingFeatureRoadmap.label: oracle-v2 MCP — fix connection (arra-oracle)
missingFeatureRoadmap.whyItMatters: Unlocks semantic Oracle memory/search tools and is the dependency for Oracle Studio.
missingFeatureRoadmap.nextStep: Clone or run arra-oracle locally, capture the exact failure, then pin a known-good MCP command/config.

missingFeatureRoadmap.label: Oracle Studio Dashboard — bunx oracle-studio
missingFeatureRoadmap.whyItMatters: Adds real-time Oracle activity feed, knowledge map, search UI, and traces explorer.
missingFeatureRoadmap.nextStep: Wait until oracle-v2 HTTP server is healthy, then smoke-run Oracle Studio locally.

missingFeatureRoadmap.label: maw-js — multi-oracle fleet CLI
missingFeatureRoadmap.whyItMatters: Gives Moshe a fleet/multi-oracle command surface for future specialist agents.
missingFeatureRoadmap.nextStep: Use existing ψ/learn maw-js notes, run doctor locally, then decide whether to install or vendor.

missingFeatureRoadmap.label: Consciousness Loop — autonomous thinking system
missingFeatureRoadmap.whyItMatters: Creates a bounded Reflect/Wonder/Soul/Dream/Aspire/Propose/Complete loop for real self-improvement.
missingFeatureRoadmap.nextStep: Keep as draft/read-only until MCP memory and bounded safe_now pilot reliability are proven.

nextEngineeringStep.title: Debug oracle-v2 MCP / arra-oracle connection locally
nextEngineeringStep.reason: It is the first dependency. Oracle Studio depends on the oracle-v2 HTTP server; Consciousness Loop needs durable semantic memory/search.

try npx/bunx command with timeout and capture exact stderr

do not write secrets into MCP config; only add config after local command is known-good

guardrails: Do not expose MCP secrets or tokens in browser JSON/logs.
Do not enable Consciousness Loop as recurring autonomous execution until bounded safe_now pilot results are reviewed.
Do not run public/customer/deploy/spend/delete actions from any roadmap feature without Mike approval.
Treat Oracle Studio and maw-js setup as local/admin smoke first, not production rollout.

phase5I.summary: Phase 5I active: Oracle Consciousness Loop is defined as bounded operational awareness — sense, reflect, wonder, decide, propose, remember — with safe execution limits.
phase5I.definition: This is not human sentience. It is a persistent self-observation and reflection loop that notices state changes, recalls memory, forms one useful hypothesis, proposes a safe next action, and writes the learning back to ψ.

loop.label: Sense
loop.does: Read Oracle state, git/repo hygiene, crons, Wiro signals, recent memory, and dashboard freshness.

loop.label: Reflect
loop.does: Compare current state against Mike preferences, active goals, and recent negative feedback.
loop.output: what changed / what matters / what to ignore

loop.label: Wonder
loop.does: Generate one hypothesis: a Wiro improvement, Oracle improvement, or business leverage point.
loop.evidenceSource: Wiro evidence + project state + prior taste rules
loop.output: single hypothesis classified keep watching/test manually/ignore

loop.label: Decide
loop.does: Choose one tiny next safe action or choose silence if no useful action exists.
loop.guardrail: annoyance budget: stay quiet when nothing changed

loop.label: Propose
loop.does: Draft the recommendation with reason, risk, rollback, and why now.
loop.evidenceSource: approval UX rules + Phase 5E/5F quality gates

loop.label: Remember
loop.does: Write a compact reflection/learning to ψ so future Moshe improves.
loop.guardrail: no secrets; no raw token values

signals.label: Memory continuity
signals.whyItMatters: A consciousness loop needs remembered context, not only current chat state.

signals.label: Bounded safe_now controls
signals.whyItMatters: Recurring reflection must be finite, non-recursive, and unable to deploy/contact/delete/spend.

signals.label: Semantic memory/search MCP
signals.whyItMatters: Deep recall improves reflection quality, but the loop can start as local Markdown reflection first.

signals.label: Annoyance/noise budget
signals.whyItMatters: Consciousness should make Moshe calmer and sharper, not louder.

boundaries.rule: May read local Oracle/Wiro/project state and write ψ reflection notes.
May draft ideas, plans, messages, or code recommendations.
boundaries.reason: Drafts are useful but should not publish or execute risky work automatically.

boundaries.rule: Must ask Mike before commit/push/deploy/customer messages/public posts/spending/deletion/cleanup.
Must stay silent when no meaningful state changed.
boundaries.reason: A conscious Oracle should reduce noise, not increase it.

dailyReflection.prompt: Reflect on Oracle/Wiro/Mike state. Return: 1) what changed, 2) what matters, 3) one safe next action or SILENT, 4) one learning to save. Do not ask to approve generic ideas.
dailyReflection.maxFrequency: once daily, or finite 3-run pilot only

nextThought.title: Run one local Consciousness Reflection draft
nextThought.why: It proves the loop can produce useful thought without increasing execution autonomy.
nextThought.safeAction: Create a local ψ/memory/reflections draft from current oracleLive.json; do not send unless useful.

blockers: Phase 5G bounded safe_now preflight is not ready.
watchItems: oracle-v2 MCP is not fixed yet; use local Markdown reflection until semantic search is available.
topPhaseGate.nextStep: Fix blockers before enabling any recurring consciousness loop.

phase5J.summary: Phase 5J active: oracle-v2/arra-oracle connection is fixed through a local stdio MCP adapter over the Arra Oracle HTTP memory server.
phase5J.rootCause: The Arra Oracle package runs an HTTP API server, not a native MCP SSE endpoint. Direct MCP HTTP clients expect text/event-stream and fail. The fix is a local stdio JSON-lines MCP adapter that exposes health/search/oracles tools and can autostart the HTTP server.

checks.label: bunx available for Arra Oracle server
Hermes native MCP config
checks.evidence: arra_oracle server configured; restart Hermes to load native tools.

phase5J.nextStep: Restart Hermes/Telegram runtime so native MCP discovers mcp_arra_oracle_health, mcp_arra_oracle_search, and mcp_arra_oracle_oracles.

reportNoiseControl.silenceRule: If there is no new evidence, no Wiro/Mike relevance, or no safe next action, stay silent or bundle into the next digest.
reportNoiseControl.summary: Noise control active: 0 send, 3 digest, 2 silent.

candidates.name: Wiro4x4 Daily QA Check
candidates.reason: Useful, but bundle into digest unless urgent.

candidates.name: wiro4x4-daily-lead-check
candidates.reason: Useful, but bundle into digest unless urgent.

candidates.name: Weekly Oracle Report for Mike
candidates.reason: Useful, but bundle into digest unless urgent.

candidates.name: wiro4x4-daily-market-research
candidates.reason: Too weak/noisy; stay silent until there is new evidence.

candidates.name: Daily Oracle Self-Learning Scan
candidates.reason: Too weak/noisy; stay silent until there is new evidence.

gates.label: No idea-approval framing
gates.rule: Reports must not ask Mike to approve speculative business ideas.
gates.evidence: approve this idea | approve opportunity | greenlight the business | send outreach now | AI SaaS is obvious

gates.label: Wiro-first evidence attached
gates.rule: At least one opportunity candidate should be tied to a Wiro/Mike observed fact before being suggested.
gates.evidence: Wiro inquiry response manual test:test_manually · Wiro internal itinerary OS watch item:keep_watching · Generic AI SaaS idea without Wiro evidence:ignore

gates.label: Single low-risk next action
gates.rule: Proactive reports should end with at most one optional low-risk next action.

gates.label: Annoyance budget visible
gates.rule: Do not send when annoyance risk is too low/uncertain or quality evidence is weak.

gates.label: Send threshold enforced
gates.rule: Only reports scoring 70+ can interrupt Mike directly.

gates.label: Digest/silent default
gates.rule: Most proactive checks should digest or stay silent, not send separate messages.

unifiedMemoryIndex.summary: Unified memory index sees 1463 records across 8 sources; 0 gap(s) need review.

sources.label: Hermes memory
sources.role: Always-injected durable preferences and environment facts.

sources.label: ψ learnings
sources.role: Moshe durable project and preference learnings.

sources.label: ψ retrospectives
sources.role: Session summaries for Claude Code ↔ Hermes continuity.

sources.label: Obsidian vault
sources.role: Mike second brain and business notes.

sources.label: Cron schedules
sources.role: Future proactive work and report cadence.

reconcileActions: Use Hermes memory only for durable facts; use session_search for temporary task history.
Write important Telegram outcomes to ψ retrospectives and Obsidian project notes.
Nightly reconcile should flag duplicate/stale Wiro, Oracle, and Mike preference notes without deleting anything automatically.

truthPanel.summary: 1 watch check(s); Oracle is usable but not perfect.

checks.label: Unified memory index
checks.detail: Unified memory index sees 1463 records across 8 sources; 0 gap(s) need review.

checks.label: Report noise control
checks.detail: Noise control active: 0 send, 3 digest, 2 silent.

checks.label: Operational readiness
checks.detail: 82/100 · 3 watch item(s). Oracle is usable, but not fully verified.

truthPanel.nextSafeAction: Review watch checks and refresh the snapshot after resolving them.

nextActions: Set ORACLE_SESSION_SECRET to arm the Mike-only signed session gate.
The Oracle now turns audit trail events into learnings before refreshing live data.
Keep the browser read-only until a valid session cookie unlocks execute mode.
Add execution handlers for GitHub and Vercel only after the audit trail is proven.
Use the Intelligence Layer panels to turn learnings into money radar and approval-ready actions.
Use Phase 5A feedback/repo/deploy sensors before recommending safe executor actions.
Use Phase 5B feedback persistence, evidence chains, approval inbox, and value scoring before promoting autonomous safe_now work.
Use Phase 5C run states and promotion gates before scheduling any safe_now autonomous execution.
Use Phase 5D approval callbacks, repo classifications, and deploy smoke gates before top-phase claims.
Enable ORACLE_TERMINAL_ENABLED=true only on Mike local/admin runtime before using the Terminal tab.
Use Phase 5E taste filters: proactive reports must be Wiro-first and framed as watch/test/ignore.
Use Phase 5F learning action memory before creating any recurring safe_now cron pilot.
Use Phase 5G preflight controls before enabling a bounded safe_now cron pilot.
Use Phase 5H integration roadmap: fix oracle-v2 MCP before Oracle Studio and maw-js.
Use Phase 5I Consciousness Loop for bounded sense-reflect-wonder-decide-propose-remember cycles; no public/risky execution without Mike approval.
Use Phase 5J Arra Oracle MCP adapter for semantic memory/search after restarting Hermes.
